meta.description: Fired by the platform event->n8n bridge at POST /webhook/ev/org_structure.updated. Verifies the bridge secret, DEDUPES on the envelope id (bridge is at-least-once), then raises an IN-APP notification for the ops lead via the hub `notify` tool (no external channel). Scoped identity wf:org-updated-notify -> [notify] (LOW write). Env: N8N_BRIDGE_SECRET, HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, NOTIFY_USER_ID.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "notify", arguments: { tenantId: $json.tenantId, recipientId: $env.NOTIFY_USER_ID, type: "org_structure_updated", payload: { entityId: $json.entityId, at: $json.at } } } }) }}
